email_body:
Beste Teamleader,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Web Designer (parttime 3/5 of 4/5). Jullie oproep voor een eenvoudige, gedurfde en menselijke webidentiteit sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en passie.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto bouw en onderhoud ik WordPress-sites met Elementor en Astra, optimaliseer ik UX/UI en zorg ik voor responsive design. Daarnaast heb ik op mirook.com een volledig ontwerp- en designsysteem opgezet, inclusief structured data en AI-optimalisatie. Mijn technische achtergrond in HTML/CSS/JS en mijn ervaring met Figma stellen me in staat om nauw samen te werken met ontwikkelaars en marketeers.

Ik werk gestructureerd, denk in componenten en hecht veel waarde aan consistente brandbeleving. Jullie hybride werkmodel en focus op groei spreken me zeer aan.

Ik voeg mijn motivatiebrief en CV bij en hoop mijn portfolio in een gesprek te kunnen toelichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Teamleader,

I am very excited to apply for the Web Designer position (part-time 3/5 or 4/5). Your call for a simple, bold, and human web identity resonates strongly with my experience and passion.

In my current role at Episto, I build and maintain WordPress sites with Elementor and Astra, optimize UX/UI, and ensure responsive design. On mirook.com, I set up a complete design system, including structured data and AI optimization. My technical background in HTML/CSS/JS and my experience with Figma enable me to collaborate closely with developers and marketers.

I work in a structured, component-based way and value consistent brand experiences. Your hybrid work model and focus on growth appeal to me greatly.

I have attached my cover letter and CV and look forward to discussing my portfolio in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste Teamleader,

Toen ik de vacature voor Web Designer las, voelde het alsof jullie mijn ideale rol hadden beschreven. Jullie zoeken iemand die een design system kan opzetten, de website visueel naar een hoger niveau tilt en nauw samenwerkt met marketingcollega’s – precies waar ik energie van krijg.

Bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met Elementor en Astra, zorg voor responsive design en een consistente gebruikerservaring. Daarbij stem ik af met content- en marketingteams om campagnepagina’s en blogs te optimaliseren. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com heb ik een compleet design system opgezet: van wireframes in Figma tot een herbruikbare componentenbibliotheek, met oog voor typografie, kleur en witruimte. Ik implementeerde structured data en AI-optimalisatie, wat me leerde hoe design en techniek samenkomen.

Jullie nadruk op een ‘simple, bold, and human’ stijl spreekt me aan. Ik geloof in clean design dat gebruikers helpt zonder afleiding. Mijn kennis van HTML/CSS/JS maakt dat ik ontwerpen kan opleveren die technisch haalbaar zijn en soepel worden geïmplementeerd. Daarnaast werk ik graag met AI-tools om sneller te itereren en creatieve ideeën te verkennen.

Wat mij aanspreekt in Teamleader is de combinatie van start-up energie en scale-up expertise. Jullie open feedbackcultuur en ruimte voor initiatief passen bij mijn werkstijl. Ik ben gewend hybride te werken en communiceer helder in het Engels; mijn Nederlands is B1 en ik volg lessen om het verder te verbeteren.

Ik hoop mijn portfolio en motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Teamleader,

When I read the job description for Web Designer, it felt like you had described my ideal role. You are looking for someone to set up a design system, elevate the website visually, and collaborate closely with marketing colleagues – exactly what energizes me.

At Episto, I build and maintain WordPress sites. I work with Elementor and Astra, ensure responsive design and a consistent user experience. I coordinate with content and marketing teams to optimize campaign pages and blogs. On my own project mirook.com, I set up a complete design system: from wireframes in Figma to a reusable component library, with attention to typography, color, and whitespace. I implemented structured data and AI optimization, which taught me how design and technology come together.

Your emphasis on a 'simple, bold, and human' style appeals to me. I believe in clean design that helps users without distraction. My knowledge of HTML/CSS/JS allows me to deliver designs that are technically feasible and smoothly implemented. I also enjoy using AI tools to iterate faster and explore creative ideas.

What attracts me to Teamleader is the combination of start-up energy and scale-up expertise. Your open feedback culture and room for initiative match my work style. I am used to hybrid working and communicate clearly in English; my Dutch is B1 and I am taking lessons to improve further.

I look forward to discussing my portfolio and motivation in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• 2+ years of professional web design experience (WordPress, Elementor, Astra, responsive design, UX/UI)
• Built and maintained a complete design system on mirook.com, including component library and brand consistency
• Proficient in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, HTML/CSS/JS, and AI-assisted design tools
• Strong collaboration with marketing teams: optimized campaign pages, blogs, and content for multiple languages
• Technical SEO and structured data expertise ensures designs are both beautiful and discoverable
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Web Design · SEO · GEO
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a strong foundation in web design, UX/UI, and design systems. At Episto, I build and maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra, ensuring responsive, user-friendly designs that align with brand guidelines. On my own project (mirook.com), I established a complete design system from wireframes to a reusable component library, with structured data and AI optimization. Experienced in collaborating with marketing teams to optimize campaign pages and content. Comfortable with Figma, HTML/CSS/JS, and AI tools to accelerate design workflows. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Web Design & UX/UI: responsive web design, design systems, component libraries, wireframing, prototyping, brand consistency
- Tools: Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, Elementor, Astra theme, WordPress
- Front-End: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, AngularJS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management
- Analytics & Reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, ensuring responsive design and consistent user experience
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Collaborate with marketing teams to optimize campaign pages and general website content
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide design and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, Design System & SEO/GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Established a comprehensive design system including wireframes in Figma, reusable component library, and consistent typography/color/whitespace
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
